---
title: Journal Review
author: Sungjun Park
format: html
---

```{=html}
<style>
table th:first-child,
table td:first-child {
  white-space: nowrap;
  width: 9em;
}
</style>
```

|Date       |Article Reviewed|
|:----------|:------|
|2026-03-06|[Prenatal Exposure to Acid-Suppressive Medications and Risk of Neuropsychiatric Disorders in Children](2026-03-05-acid-suppressive/index.html)
